name: Denny Park
content:
Denny Park is located in downtown Seattle. I stopped in Denny Park to rest while I contemplated how to resolve the Hyatt Regency Hotel Situation. I had thus far been denied entry into the hotel, but was yet to come up with a plan that would result in a place for me to sleep that night. The shade of a tree in Denny Park and a box of peaches I needed to use the bathroom, which ended up being at a grocery store that required me to purchase at least one item before I could use their bathroom, thus resulting in a box of peaches coming into my possession. provided me some solace during this time.
As I sat there to ponder, more people filtered into the park, including a couple that set up a picnic blanket about twenty feet away from and began making out. To be fair, it is a fairly small urban park, so it’s not like they had many other options on where to set up, but it did make pondering a little more difficult. The other people in the park were fine, and it felt nice to be amongst a lot of other humans just hanging out in a grassy area.
The point here is, you can be in some weird, uncertain, and downright unstable situation, but still enjoy yourself. Perhaps I find a little too much comfort in chaos.
